title: MX
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Mxtheweapon.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The MX on Coruscant]]
The '''MX''' was a heavy weapon the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was developing in [[3996 BBY]]. It was an emplaced weapon that utilized crystals and was powered by an ion flow. It was stated to be powerful enough to "clean off a quarter-deck in half a millisec."

[[Mandalore the Indomitable]] captured an MX prototype during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Great Sith War)|Battle of Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 2]] {{1st}}
